2199280.name: YUMA
2199280.description:
KEY FEATURES:

  • Use the power of possession - control the characters, reveal their secrets and change the course of events with unique speeches and decisions.

  • Stay unseen - hide, improvise and interact with the world in order to fly under the radar.

  • Explore a medieval world full of magic and mysteries - find hidden facts and collectibles, complete side missions.

  • Dive into the atmosphere of the game with its pixel art and soothing music that changes in harmony with the protagonist's mood.

MEET YUMA

Bold and charismatic, she always lived by her own rules, that is, until the war shattered her world. A gift she never asked for now forces her into a role she was never ready to play.

Beneath her brave exterior lies an inner struggle - not just against enemies, but against her own fears and doubts. Every step on this journey transforms her, forcing her to walk a fine line between the past she's trying to leave behind and the future she must embrace.

THE UNIQUE SETTING

The game's world is a fusion of magic and harsh medieval realism. The Southerners are a cultured nation thriving on fertile lands, while the Northerners are resilient dwellers of frigid territories, their strength rooted in metallurgy and military might. In this world full of contrasts, Yuma must forge her own story and become entwined in the complex dynamics of nations encountering each other for the very first time.

[/list]
